description: Implement DispatchContext threading through the op-execution contract per DEC-0006 / FGAP-008: add a ctx/writer channel to OpDefinition.run + registerAll (thread the pi ExtensionContext verified identity) + the pi-context-cli dispatch (build DispatchContext from --writer); forward ctx in all 10 ctx-dropping op handlers (append/update/remove-block-item, the nested trio, write-block, append-relation, amend-config, write-schema) and the pi-workflows step-block.ts writers; fix context-archive's declared-but-ignored writer. Full completion sequence. Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.
